year’s, i.e., the payment year [e.g. the 2019 CCW files]) Medicare Part A and Part B expenditures. CMS updates model 
versions for a variety of reasons, including changes in valid diagnoses mappings, updates to the years used to calibrate 
the model, and changes in clinical and policy objectives.15 The annual advance notice includes proposed models that
